title: Pelargonium papaverifolium

The classification of Pelargonium papaverifolium is further divided into the order Geraniales and the clade Rosidae. intro: Pelargonium papaverifolium, also known as Rose Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, characterized by its distinctive rose-scented leaves and clusters of small, pink flowers. The health benefits of Pelargonium papaverifolium include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote a restful sleep.
